title: Thoughts and things 1/15/2025
html:
Yahir catches himself believing that shipping brotein will deliver validation — and corrects: validation won't come from the launch, the work has to be autotelic. Names the felt sense as "for the love of the game" and pushes himself into plus ultra mode of going where others won't.

TL;DR

  • First explicit articulation of "brotein launch will not give me validation" — the autotelic frame is the antidote.
  • Names self-isolating in his room as a side effect of how absorbing brotein is, and accepts it as cost.
  • Coins / leans on plus ultra (the "go beyond" anime trope) as a personal motto for his work intensity.
  • This entry is a load-bearing prequel to the later founder loneliness 2022 2026 synthesis.
  • Sets a tonal contrast with the financial-anxiety thoughts and things series entries earlier in January.

brotein · autotelic · plus ultra · validation trap · thoughts and things series · post china limbo
